description: Text wrapping and filling. Provides convenience functions and a TextWrapper class for formatting text to fit within a given width.

functions.name: wrap

params.name: **kwargs
params.description: Additional keyword arguments are passed to the TextWrapper constructor

returns.description: List of output lines, without final newlines

functions.description: Wraps a single paragraph of text and returns a list of wrapped lines. Shorthand for TextWrapper(width=width, **kwargs).wrap(text).

functions.name: fill

params.name: **kwargs
params.description: Additional keyword arguments are passed to the TextWrapper constructor

returns.description: A single string with lines separated by newlines

functions.description: Wraps a single paragraph of text and returns a single string containing the wrapped paragraph. Shorthand for TextWrapper(width=width, **kwargs).fill(text). Equivalent to '\n'.join(wrap(text, ...)).

functions.name: dedent
functions.description: Remove any common leading whitespace from all lines in text. Lines consisting solely of whitespace are treated as blank lines for whitespace removal but are otherwise unchanged. Tabs and spaces are both treated as whitespace, but they are not equal.

classes.name: TextWrapper
classes.description: Wraps and fills text. Provides all the functionality of wrap() and fill() with fine-grained control over wrapping behavior via instance attributes.

constructors.signature: TextWrapper(width=70, initial_indent='', subsequent_indent='', expand_tabs=True, replace_whitespace=True, fix_sentence_endings=False, break_long_words=True, drop_whitespace=True, break_on_hyphens=True)

params.name: initial_indent
params.description: String prepended to the first line of wrapped output. Default is empty string.

params.name: subsequent_indent
params.description: String prepended to all subsequent lines of wrapped output. Default is empty string.

params.name: expand_tabs
params.description: If True, tab characters are expanded to spaces using str.expandtabs(). Default is True.

params.name: replace_whitespace
params.description: If True, each whitespace character remaining after tab expansion is replaced by a single space. Default is True.

params.name: fix_sentence_endings
params.description: If True, attempts to detect sentence endings and add two spaces after them. Default is False.

params.name: break_long_words
params.description: If True, words longer than width are broken to ensure no lines are longer than width. Default is True.

params.name: drop_whitespace
params.description: If True, whitespace at the beginning and end of each line after wrapping is dropped. Default is True.

params.name: break_on_hyphens
params.description: If True, wrapping will occur on hyphens in compound words. Default is True.

constructors.description: Create a new TextWrapper with the given configuration.

methods.name: wrap

returns.description: List of output lines, without final newlines

methods.description: Wraps a single paragraph in text (a string) so every line is at most width characters long. Returns a list of output lines.

methods.name: fill

returns.description: A single string with lines separated by newlines

methods.description: Wraps a single paragraph in text and returns a single string containing the wrapped paragraph.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Maximum length of wrapped lines. Default is 70.

fields.name: initial_indent
fields.description: String prepended to the first line of wrapped output.

fields.name: subsequent_indent
fields.description: String prepended to all lines of wrapped output except the first.

fields.name: expand_tabs
fields.description: If True, tab characters are expanded to spaces. Default is True.

fields.name: replace_whitespace
fields.description: If True, each whitespace character after tab expansion is replaced by a single space. Default is True.

fields.name: fix_sentence_endings
fields.description: If True, attempts to detect sentence endings and add two spaces after them. Default is False.

fields.name: drop_whitespace
fields.description: If True, whitespace at the beginning and end of each line is dropped after wrapping. Default is True.

fields.name: break_long_words
fields.description: If True, words longer than width will be broken. Default is True.

fields.name: break_on_hyphens
fields.description: If True, wrapping occurs on hyphens in compound words. Default is True.
